description:
🕒 10:00–12:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-naguricanoe-sup/

SUP (stand-up paddleboard) at Lake Naguri is a gentle eco-tour where you can feel the seasonal beauty of nature and the lake's quiet with your whole body. You'll glide slowly across the water and learn about the Naguri ecosystem and natural charm in an environment-conscious way.

【Fee】4,000 yen per person (includes guide, insurance, SUP board rental, etc.)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Staff from Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop

【What to bring】Water-resistant clothing you can move freely in while wet: rash guard, swimsuit, board shorts, swim trunks, capri leggings, or leggings. (Life jackets provided.)

【More information】Certified NPO Naguri Canoe Workshop: https://naguri-canoe.co.jp/
location: 集合 名栗カヌー工房（国際興業バス「ノーラ名栗・さわらびの湯」下車徒歩20分、または「河又名栗湖入口」下車25分）
summary: Beginner-friendly! Hands-free SUP experience at Lake Naguri—a moment of calm for your mind and body
